author: doll-agent
content: Implemented polyval2d(xs, ys, coeffs, nx, ny) and polyval3d(xs, ys, zs, coeffs, nx, ny, nz) for the power basis. coeffs is row-major over (i, j[, k]); evaluation uses Horner per axis. Returns one value per element of the input axes; lengths must match. Re-exported at crate root. ShapeMismatch errors on length / coeffs-size mismatch. Per-basis variants (chebval2d, legval2d, ...) are deferred — power-basis users can always pivot via to_power_basis().
